title: Legacy Implementation Drift
description: Scan for split responsibilities, semantic drift, duplicate helpers, and quarantine-vs-mainline mismatches introduced by version transitions. Require concrete file:line evidence.
findings: 发现 4 处明确的版本演进漂移：主线已切到 stdio + `fab_recall`/`fab_get_knowledge_sections`，但 getting-started、test-seed、architecture landscape 与 shared locale 仍传播 `fab_get_rule_sections`、`fabric serve` 和已删除的 server 服务，容易误导用户、测试生成与维护判断。
issues_found: [{"title":"Getting-started still teaches the retired MCP retrieval flow","severity":"high","description":"`docs/getting-started.md` 在 stdio-only 章节后，仍把 `fab_plan_context` + `fab_get_rule_sections` 说成“新流程只需要的两个 MCP tools”，并给出基于 `fab_get_rule_sections` 的验证 prompt。实际主线已经把 `fab_recall` 作为默认入口，并使用 `fab_get_knowledge_sections` 作为两步回退（`packages/server/src/index.ts:190`，`packages/server/README.md:7`）。这会让新用户按过时接口验证安装。","location":"docs/getting-started.md:91","fix_direction":"把验证流程改成 `fab_recall` 优先，统一将 `fab_get_rule_sections` 更名为 `fab_get_knowledge_sections`，仅把两步流保留为正文过大时的回退路径。","affected_components":["docs/getting-started.md","packages/server/src/index.ts","packages/server/README.md"]},{"title":"Test seeds still encode quarantined serve/REST surfaces as active mainline intent","severity":"high","description":"种子总览仍声明 cli 的 4 个公共命令包含 `serve`，server 仍覆盖 12 个 REST endpoints 和 2 个 MCP tools（`fab_plan_context`、`fab_get_rule_sections`）；包级 server 种子还继续列 `/api/*`、`/events`、Dashboard 与 `FABRIC_AUTH_TOKEN` auth（`docs/test-seed/server.md:7`）。但主线公开命令面已经是 `install`、`scan`、`doctor`、`uninstall`，HTTP/REST/serve 已 quarantine（`docs/CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE.md:57`）。由于 test seed 是 integration-test-cycle 的意图输入，这会持续传播错误测试目标。","location":"docs/test-seed/README.md:7","fix_direction":"按 v2 主线重写 `docs/test-seed/{README,server,cli}.md`：去掉 `serve` 与 REST/Dashboard 主线职责，补入 `fab_recall` / `fab_get_knowledge_sections` 和 stdio-only 约束。","affected_components":["docs/test-seed/README.md","docs/test-seed/server.md","docs/test-seed/cli.md"]},{"title":"Codebase landscape points maintainers at deleted mainline server services","severity":"medium","description":"`docs/CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE.md` 的 server 表仍把 `src/services/get-rules.ts` 和 `src/services/annotate-intent.ts` 列为主线文件，并把 `annotate-intent` 证据指向已 quarantine 的 `packages/server/src/api/intent.ts:4`。实际 `packages/server/src/services/` 下已不存在这两个文件（仓内文件枚举为空命中），文档把主线与 quarantine 时代的职责混写，维护者会被引到不存在的实现。","location":"docs/CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE.md:86","fix_direction":"清理 server 表中的已删条目，把历史 HTTP/intent 路径全部移到 `server-http-experimental`/历史说明区，只保留当前主线真实存在的 service 列表。","affected_components":["docs/CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE.md","packages/server/src/services","packages/server-http-experimental"]},{"title":"Shared CLI locale strings still advertise removed `fabric serve` help text","severity":"medium","description":"`packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts` 与 `zh-CN.ts` 的 `cli.main.description` 仍把 “Run - fabric serve” 作为三步心智模型的一部分，并展示 `fabric serve --port 7373` 示例。可主线命令面文档已经明确只保留 `install`、`scan`、`doctor`、`uninstall`，`serve` 自 rc.37 起已 quarantine（`docs/CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE.md:57`）。这不是单纯旧文档，而是仍会出现在用户帮助文案里的旧迁移指引。","location":"packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts:8","fix_direction":"更新 `cli.main.description` 的中英文文案，移除 `fabric serve`/HTTP 服务示例，改成当前支持的 stdio 安装与诊断路径，并补对应快照测试。","affected_components":["packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts","packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts","CLI help surface"]}]

title: Command Surface Doc Drift
description: Scan for mismatches between actual CLI behavior/surfaces and README, migration guides, architecture docs, tooling manifests, and quickstart docs. Require concrete file:line evidence.
findings: 发现 3 个有明确证据的命令面文档漂移：README / surfaces / landscape 仍把 `init`、`scan`、`hooks install` 当成现行 CLI；MCP 合同与架构文档仍引用已删除的 `fab_get_rule_sections` / `get-rules.ts`；test seed / testing 文档继续把已退休的 `scan` / `serve` 当成校验基线，和当前命令注册表脱节。
issues_found: [{"title":"Quick start and CLI surface docs still point to removed `init` / `scan` / `hooks install` commands","severity":"high","description":"README quick start still tells users to run `pnpm dlx @fenglimg/fabric-cli init` at README.md:199, while docs/surfaces.md:24 still lists `scan` and `hooks install` as CLI examples, and docs/CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE.md:9,57,61 still says the public surface is `install/scan/doctor/uninstall` and cites `src/commands/init.ts` / `scan.ts`. The live registry in packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts:8-30 has no `init`, no `scan`, and no `hooks` subcommand; it now exposes `install`, `store`, `sync`, `info`, deprecated `whoami/status/scope-explain`, `doctor`, `uninstall`, `config`, hidden `plan-context-hint` / `onboard-coverage`, and `metrics`. `Test-Path` also shows `packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts` and `packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts` do not exist. This means the primary onboarding docs tell users to invoke commands that the shipped CLI no longer provides.","location":"README.md:199","fix_direction":"Rewrite README / surfaces / landscape to match the current registry: use `fabric install` as the entrypoint, document that `fabric scan` was removed in favor of `fabric doctor --rescan`, remove `hooks install`, and surface the current `store` / `sync` / `info` / `metrics` commands where relevant.","affected_components":["README.md","docs/surfaces.md","docs/CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE.md","packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts"]},{"title":"MCP architecture and contract docs still describe deleted `fab_get_rule_sections` / `get-rules.ts` surfaces","severity":"high","description":"docs/mcp-contracts.md:3,16,21,107 still says Fabric has only four MCP tools and documents `fab_get_rule_sections`; docs/ARCHITECTURE_DECISIONS.md:19,34-36,52-53 still points readers at `packages/server/src/tools/get-rules.ts` and `packages/server/src/services/get-rules.ts`, and says the editor loop is `fab_plan_context` + `fab_get_rule_sections`. In the live server, packages/server/src/index.ts:17-22 and 218-223 import/register `registerPlanContext`, `registerKnowledgeSections`, `registerRecall`, `registerArchiveScan`, `registerExtractKnowledge`, and `registerReview` — six tools total, with `fab_get_knowledge_sections` replacing the old name and additive `fab_recall` / `fab_archive_scan` already live. `Test-Path` confirms the referenced `get-rules.ts` files no longer exist. Integrators following the docs will target wrong tool names and stale implementation paths.","location":"docs/mcp-contracts.md:21","fix_direction":"Update contracts and ADRs to the current MCP surface: rename `fab_get_rule_sections` to `fab_get_knowledge_sections`, add `fab_recall` and `fab_archive_scan`, and replace deleted `get-rules.ts` references with the current `plan-context` / `knowledge-sections` modules.","affected_components":["docs/mcp-contracts.md","docs/ARCHITECTURE_DECISIONS.md","packages/server/src/index.ts"]},{"title":"Test-seed and testing docs still validate a retired CLI surface (`scan` / `serve`, six-command registry)","severity":"medium","description":"The doc-driven test seed has not kept up with the current command surface. docs/testing-architecture.md:88 says the CLI help drift gate snapshots `fabric scan --help`; docs/test-seed/cli.md:13 still treats `serve` as a live command, line 73 says `fabric scan` is retired but the same file still anchors expectations around it, and lines 78-81 claim the registry has only six entries (`install,doctor,serve,uninstall,config,plan-context-hint`) plus `scan.ts`. The actual registry at packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts:8-30 has no `serve` or `scan` and now includes many additional commands (`store`, `sync`, `info`, `whoami`, `status`, `scope-explain`, `onboard-coverage`, `metrics`). This means the seed docs and test-architecture narrative keep propagating an obsolete command model to reviewers and maintainers.","location":"docs/test-seed/cli.md:78","fix_direction":"Refresh `docs/test-seed/cli.md` and `docs/testing-architecture.md` so the documented drift gate and seed surface match the current registry, or explicitly mark them as historical if they are intentionally frozen.","affected_components":["docs/test-seed/cli.md","docs/testing-architecture.md","packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts"]}]

title: Compat Layer Staleness
description: Scan for backward-compat or deprecated branches that now conflict with current semantics, create misleading warnings, or preserve obsolete state shapes too long. Require concrete file:line evidence.
findings: 发现 4 个兼容层陈旧问题：主文档仍教授已移除的 `fab_get_rule_sections`/section-based 流程；知识类型文档仍使用旧成熟度 `endorsed/stable` 和旧命令 `--apply-lint`；CLI README 继续暴露已 quarantine 的 `fabric serve`；bootstrap/quickstart 仍把 `doctor --fix` 说成 pending 审核入口，和当前 `--fix`/`--fix-knowledge` 语义冲突。
issues_found: [{"title":"Getting-started docs still teach the retired `fab_get_rule_sections` flow","severity":"high","description":"`docs/getting-started.md` still says the new flow uses only `fab_plan_context` + `fab_get_rule_sections`, and even instructs callers to request legacy sections like `MISSION_STATEMENT`. The live server now advertises `fab_recall` as the preferred entry point and registers `fab_get_knowledge_sections` instead of `fab_get_rule_sections`, so a fresh user following this guide will call a non-existent tool and learn an obsolete section-based contract. Similar stale naming also appears in `docs/mcp-contracts.md:21`, `docs/ARCHITECTURE_DECISIONS.md:34`, and `docs/test-seed/server.md:11`.","location":"docs/getting-started.md:92","fix_direction":"Rewrite onboarding and MCP contract docs around the current retrieval contract: prefer `fab_recall(paths)`; document `fab_plan_context` + `fab_get_knowledge_sections` only as the fallback two-step path; remove section-name examples tied to the retired rule-section API.","affected_components":["docs/getting-started.md","docs/mcp-contracts.md","docs/ARCHITECTURE_DECISIONS.md","docs/test-seed/server.md","packages/server/src/index.ts","packages/server/src/tools/knowledge-sections.ts","packages/server/src/tools/recall.ts"]},{"title":"Knowledge lifecycle docs still publish pre-migration maturity names and doctor flag","severity":"medium","description":"`docs/knowledge-types.md` still describes the lifecycle as `draft / endorsed / stable` and says demotion/archive happen via `doctor --apply-lint`, but the shared contract has already locked the canonical maturity enum to `draft / verified / proven`, and the CLI exposes `--fix-knowledge` instead of `--apply-lint`. This leaves readers with an obsolete state vocabulary and a stale repair command while the codebase has moved on. The same old flag name is still repeated in `docs/configuration.md:289` and `docs/roadmap.md:49`.","location":"docs/knowledge-types.md:23","fix_direction":"Align lifecycle docs with the current schema and CLI: rename maturity stages to `draft / verified / proven`, update transition examples, and replace user-facing `--apply-lint` guidance with `fabric doctor --fix-knowledge` wherever the text is not explicitly documenting legacy compatibility.","affected_components":["docs/knowledge-types.md","docs/configuration.md","docs/roadmap.md","packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts","packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts"]},{"title":"CLI README still advertises the removed `fabric serve` command as the quickstart path","severity":"high","description":"The package README tells users to start `fabric serve` and says the public CLI surface still includes `serve`, but the main command registry has already quarantined `serve` and no longer wires it into the shipped CLI. Following the README now sends users to a command that the current main-line binary does not expose, which is a false backward-compat promise and an onboarding dead end.","location":"packages/cli/README.md:10","fix_direction":"Update the CLI README to the stdio-only flow: `fabric install`, then validate the MCP server through the client integration rather than a local `serve` process; remove `serve` from the advertised public surface and point any historical HTTP guidance at the quarantine README if needed.","affected_components":["packages/cli/README.md","packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts"]},{"title":"Canonical bootstrap still tells users to use `doctor --fix` for pending-entry review","severity":"medium","description":"The canonical bootstrap template says the 4-step loop ends with `fabric-review` or `fabric doctor --fix` to review/archive pending knowledge, and `docs/USER-QUICKSTART.md` repeats the same guidance. But the current CLI help defines `--fix` as derived-state repair only and `--fix-knowledge` as the knowledge-mutation surface. That means the compatibility wording in the bootstrap now teaches a no-op/partial remediation path right where new users learn the workflow. Related existing issue: ISS-20260531-022.","location":"packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts:84","fix_direction":"Change bootstrap and quickstart guidance so pending knowledge triage points to `fabric-review` and, where a CLI fallback is desired, `fabric doctor --fix-knowledge`; reserve `fabric doctor --fix` for derived-state reconciliation messaging only.","affected_components":["packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts","docs/USER-QUICKSTART.md","packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts"]}]

title: Example Test Fixture Drift
description: Scan tests, fixtures, test-seed docs, and templates for examples that still teach obsolete commands, layouts, or migration expectations. Require concrete file:line evidence.
findings: 发现 4 个有明确 file:line 证据的示例/测试种子漂移问题：CLI 与 server 的 test-seed 仍描述已 quarantine 的 HTTP/serve 面；初始化文档仍安装旧的 `archive-hint.cjs`；`surfaces.md` 这个“source of truth” 仍把 `scan` / `hooks install` 当作现行 CLI 示例。
issues_found: [{"title":"Server test seed still documents quarantined HTTP server contract","severity":"high","description":"`docs/test-seed/server.md` 仍把 server 写成“12 REST + 14 services + 2 MCP tools + 1 MCP resource”，并继续使用旧工具名 `fab_get_rule_sections`、列出 `/api/*`/`/events`/`/mcp`、`FABRIC_AUTH_TOKEN`、watcher 与 serve-lock 不变量（`docs/test-seed/server.md:9-57`）。但当前主线 server 已是 stdio-only MCP：README 只暴露 `fab_plan_context`、`fab_get_knowledge_sections`、`fab_recall`、`fab_extract_knowledge`、`fab_review`（`packages/server/README.md:3-11`），`packages/server/src/index.ts:17-22` 也只注册这些 stdio tools。","location":"docs/test-seed/server.md:9","fix_direction":"把 server seed 改成当前 stdio MCP 合同，删除主线已 quarantine 的 REST/auth/serve-lock/watcher 叙述，并把工具名更新为 `fab_get_knowledge_sections` / `fab_recall` 等现行接口。","affected_components":["docs/test-seed","server docs","MCP tool contracts"]},{"title":"CLI test seed still treats `fabric serve` as current command surface","severity":"high","description":"`docs/test-seed/cli.md` 仍把命令面写成“Public commands (5)”，包含 `serve`，并在不变量与 Source Traceability 中继续依赖 serve-lock、`packages/cli/src/commands/serve.ts`（`docs/test-seed/cli.md:9-18`,`27`,`39-40`,`78-80`）。当前命令注册表已经明确 `serve` 被 quarantine，并新增 `store`、`sync`、`info`、`metrics` 等命令（`packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts:1-30`）。这会让种子文档继续传播旧命令布局。","location":"docs/test-seed/cli.md:9","fix_direction":"按当前 `packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts` 重写 CLI seed：移除 `serve`/旧 serve-lock 叙述，补齐现行命令组与隐藏命令定义，并同步修正 source traceability。","affected_components":["docs/test-seed","CLI surface docs","command registry"]},{"title":"Initialization guide still installs legacy `archive-hint.cjs`","severity":"medium","description":"`docs/initialization.md` 在 Phase 4 与安装布局中仍把 Stop hook 写成 `.claude/hooks/archive-hint.cjs` / `.codex/hooks/archive-hint.cjs`，并让 hook config 指向这些旧路径（`docs/initialization.md:25-27`,`107-111`,`126-128`）。但模板 README 已明确 `archive-hint.cjs` 只是 pre-rc.5 历史名称，当前规范名是 `fabric-hint.cjs`（`packages/cli/templates/hooks/configs/README.md:90-95`）；集成测试也要求重新安装时清扫 legacy `archive-hint.cjs` 条目（`packages/cli/__tests__/integration/install-skills-and-hooks.test.ts:439-489`）。","location":"docs/initialization.md:108","fix_direction":"把初始化文档的 Stop-hook 名称、路径示例和 merge 说明统一替换为 `fabric-hint.cjs`，并仅把 `archive-hint.cjs` 保留为历史迁移注释。","affected_components":["docs","hook install docs","client hook templates"]},{"title":"`surfaces.md` marked as source of truth still teaches removed CLI commands","severity":"medium","description":"`docs/surfaces.md` 自称是“which surface to use”的 source of truth（`docs/surfaces.md:8-9`），但 CLI 一栏仍把 `scan`、`hooks install` 当作现行示例（`docs/surfaces.md:24`）。当前命令注册表没有这两个顶层命令，且已经转向 `store`、`sync`、`info`、`metrics` 等表面（`packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts:6-30`）。这会把已经迁移掉的入口继续当成推荐路径。","location":"docs/surfaces.md:24","fix_direction":"更新 surfaces guide 的 CLI 示例与决策说明，反映当前主线命令面；若保留历史命令，只能放到 clearly-labeled migration/historical 小节。","affected_components":["docs","surface selection guide","CLI onboarding"]}]
